productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Grey Top
description: Composition Grey top made of 65% polyester 35% viscose with long sleeves Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash cold using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; Do not iron directly on print/embroidery For the sassy fashionista, this top from united colors of benetton has a minimalistic appeal. This top with its simplistic style and narrowing silhouette is an example of the label's versatility. Pair this with skinny jeans, a trench coat and closed toe pumps from catwalk. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
